operator_rule: Continue in the mutable draft lane only while the lineage remains an actual draft.
Refresh after routine submit must land on authoritative request receipt instead of reopening the draft.
Stale background tabs may continue same-lineage navigation but may not mutate.
Once the request is already active the stale draft entry must land on status rather than receipt.
Urgent-diverted lineages must reopen the urgent outcome shell instead of any mutable editor.
Do not leak request truth when same-lineage proof is missing or insufficient.
Fall into bounded same-shell recovery instead of generic expired-link handling.
